subcodes.first_line: ...Ordinances which are obligatory and decrees that are binding are those that have issued forth from the Supreme Pen or are issued by a decision of the Universal House of Justice
subcodes.first_line_orig: حکم مفروض و امر واجب آنست که از قلم اعلی صادر و یا بقرار بیت العدل عمومی حاصل گردد... و اما اوراد و اذکار بعد از هر نماز هر کس خواهد مناجاتهای
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for governments and rulers, @House of Justice, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @suffering and imprisonment
